home.title: KCHNG
home.description: Turn community service into shared value
home.audience: For communities, cooperatives, and collectives who want to track and reward the work that keeps them running.
home.step1Desc: Do community service — cooking, cleaning, maintenance, teaching, organizing.
home.step2Desc: Your community validates the work. No algorithms, just trust.
home.valueNote: Value tied to real work, not speculation. One KCHNG always equals the same thing.
home.realValueDesc: 1000 KCHNG = 1 community meal. Simple, stable, understandable.
home.communityVerifiedDesc: Work is validated by people you know. Trust built through relationships.
home.staysActiveDesc: Currency circulates instead of sitting idle. Good for everyone.
home.madeForCommunitiesDesc: Built for eco-villages, cooperatives, housing collectives, and community spaces.
home.whyDemurrageDesc1: KCHNG is designed to keep value moving through your community. When tokens sit unused for too long, they gradually decrease — encouraging people to spend, share, or trade rather than hoard.
home.whyDemurrageDesc2: This isn't a penalty. It's how the system stays healthy. Active currency means more trades, more connections, and a stronger community economy.
home.whyDemurrageExample: Example: If you don't use your balance for a month, it might decrease by about 1%. Stay active and it stays full.
home.whoIsThisForDesc: KCHNG works best for communities that:
home.whoIsThisForItem1: Have a concept of community service or shared work
home.whoIsThisForItem2: Want to track and reward contributions fairly
home.whoIsThisForItem3: Are small enough that members know each other
home.learnMoreLink: Learn more about how KCHNG works
home.getStartedDesc: Connect your wallet to access the full KCHNG platform:

header.feedbackPlaceholder: Describe your feedback, suggestion, or issue...
header.contactConsent: I agree to be contacted regarding my feedback (optional)
header.feedbackError: Failed to submit. Please try again.

demurrage.title: Demurrage Status
demurrage.resetNotice: Send any transaction to reset the timer and prevent demurrage
demurrage.warningNotice: Your KCHNG is being burned due to inactivity. Make a transaction now to stop it!

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.circulationHint: Submit work or make a transfer to keep your balance active in the community.
dashboard.notTrustMember: You are not a member of any trust.
dashboard.pleaseConnectWallet: Please connect your wallet to view your dashboard.

work.title: Work Verification
work.subtitle: Earn KCHNG by contributing verified community work
work.mustJoinTrust: You must join a trust before submitting work claims.
work.howItWorksDesc: Submit evidence of community work. Minimum 2 verifiers from your trust will review and approve. Approved work earns KCHNG based on time and work type multiplier.
work.minutesHint: 30 min verified work = 1000 KCHNG = 1 community meal
work.evidenceHint: Upload photos or documents as proof of your work
work.becomeVerifierDesc: Stake 100,000 KCHNG to verify community work claims. Required: minimum 2 verifiers per trust.
work.checkStatus: Please connect your wallet to check verifier status.
work.noPendingClaims: No pending claims available for verification.
work.connectToView: Please connect your wallet to view your claims.
work.noClaimsDesc: Submit your first work claim to start earning KCHNG!
